Detailed Description

Function Documentation

void jsm_init ( uint32_t  log2cap,
uint32_t  load 
)

Creates and initializes the Java string manager with an initial capacity of 2 ^ log2cap capacity entries

Parameters:
log2cap The binary logarythm of the initial capacity
load Maximum load before a rehash is needed

Definition at line 86 of file jstring.c.

References jstring_manager_t::buckets, jstring_manager_t::capacity, jstring_manager_t::entries, gc_malloc(), jstring_manager_t::init_capacity, jstring_manager_t::lit_buckets, jstring_manager_t::lit_capacity, jstring_manager_t::lit_entries, jstring_manager_t::lit_init_capacity, jstring_manager_t::lit_load, and jstring_manager_t::load.

Referenced by vm_init().

void jsm_mark ( void   ) 

Marks the Java literals present in the manager. This function doesn't acquire the VM lock as it can be called only when all the threads have been stopped

Definition at line 122 of file jstring.c.

References gc_mark_reference(), JAVA_LANG_STRING_PTR2REF, jstring_manager_t::lit_buckets, jstring_manager_t::lit_capacity, and java_lang_String_t::next.

Referenced by gc_mark().

void jsm_purge ( void   ) 

Purge the Java string manager from all the unused Java strings. This function must be called after jsm_mark(). This function doesn't acquire the VM lock as it can be called only when all the threads have been stopped

Definition at line 141 of file jstring.c.

References jstring_manager_t::buckets, jstring_manager_t::capacity, jstring_manager_t::entries, java_lang_String_t::header, header_is_marked(), and java_lang_String_t::next.

Referenced by gc_collect().

static void jsm_rehash ( uint32_t  capacity  )  [static]

Rehashes the Java string manager. This function doesn't acquire the VM lock as it can be called only when all the threads have been stopped

Parameters:
capacity The new capacity

References jstring_manager_t::buckets, java_lang_String_t::cachedHashCode, jstring_manager_t::capacity, gc_free(), gc_malloc(), and java_lang_String_t::next.

Referenced by jstring_intern().

static void jsm_rehash_literals ( uint32_t  capacity  )  [static]

Rehashes the Java string manager literals hash-table. This function doesn't acquire the VM lock as it can be called only when all the threads have been stopped

Parameters:
capacity The new capacity

void jsm_set_classes ( class_t *  str_cl,
class_t *  char_array_cl 
)

Passes the pointers to the java.lang.String class and the [C array class to the Java string manager, the manager is not really functional until this second initialization step has been done

Parameters:
str_cl A pointer to the java.lang.String class
char_array_cl A pointer to the [C class
